CRAFT BEERMODERNAPPROACH

We make bold beers for people who appreciate clean design and quality ingredients. No pretentious tasting notes. No overcomplicated recipes. Just four beers done right.

“Finally, a lager that doesn't taste like water. This is my go-to after a run.”

Sarah K. — Vancouver

LIME LAGER

“Big IPA flavor without the bitterness. This is the IPA that converted me.”

James L. — Toronto

CITRUS IPA

“Smooth, balanced, perfect for any occasion. I keep a 12-pack in my fridge.”

PALE ALE
